case_title: ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. FERNANDO CORCUCHIA ET AL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORCUCHIA, FERNANDO AN INDIVIDUAL $4,455.32 PRINCIPAL, $775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $279.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,509.82, SEE SCANNED DOC
